opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I threw up what looked like wet coffee grounds, and when I stood up from the toilet, I nearly blacked out.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Vomited something that looked like coffee grounds and nearly fainted standing up, feeling very unwell.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about 12 hours ago with generalised weakness and stomach discomfort, coffee-ground vomiting more recently, black stools in the last 4 hours
symptom_narrative.character: vomit looked like wet coffee grounds; stools black, tarry, and foul-smelling
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: upper stomach area discomfort, plus the vomiting and stools
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worsening, with 2 episodes of black stool in the last 4 hours
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing or sitting up makes me feel like I'm going to faint
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling very weak, dizzy and lightheaded especially on standing, generally unwell
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't stand or sit up without severe dizziness, staying in bed

social_history_volunteered.alcohol: heavy alcohol intake, reported by patient

objective_data_offered.value: looks very pale and sweaty, visible on video

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: frightened by the blood and the fainting episode, wants to know if this is serious

communication_style.typical_message_style: short messages, feels too weak/dizzy to type much, spouse helping relay information

access_barriers.transport: spouse present, but patient's dizziness on standing makes safe self-transport unsafe
